Title: The Dream Begins
Description: Growing up in the Bay Area, Eric fell in love with baseball. Hours in the cage, weekend tournaments, and a dream that felt bigger than everyone said it was.

Title: JUCO Walk-On
Description: No scholarship offers. No D1 interest. Eric walked on to a junior college team with nothing but heart and a chip on his shoulder. The underdog era started here.
QuoteText: Nobody believed in me. So I had to believe in myself.

Title: First YouTube Upload
Description: A teammate filmed Eric's batting practice. He uploaded it on a whim. 47 views. But something about putting himself out there felt right.

Title: The Bat Flip Heard Around the Internet
Description: One swing. One bat flip. 10 million views overnight. Eric woke up to a phone that wouldn't stop buzzing. The internet had found its new baseball personality.
QuoteText: I checked my phone and thought it was broken. 10 million views. What?

Title: Building Through the Pandemic
Description: When baseball shut down, Eric doubled down on content. Daily uploads, creative challenges, and a community that kept growing. 100K subscribers.

Title: Meeting Tatis Jr.
Description: A DM turned into a phone call. A phone call turned into a collab. Eric linked up with Fernando Tatis Jr. and the baseball world took notice. This wasn't just a YouTuber anymore.
QuoteText: He's not just a content creator. He's one of us.

Title: Julio Rodriguez Connection
Description: J-Rod saw Eric's content and reached out personally. What started as a fan moment became a genuine friendship built on mutual respect and love for the game.

Title: 500K Subscribers
Description: Half a million people chose to follow the journey. Eric celebrated by hosting a massive fan meetup at a minor league park. The community was real.

Title: 1 Million Strong
Description: The gold play button arrived. From 47 views to 1 million subscribers. The JUCO walk-on became the King of JUCO. Proof that the underdog story never gets old.
QuoteText: This isn't my achievement. This is ours.

Title: The Home Base
Description: YouTube was the beginning. But owning the relationship with fans — that's the future. Welcome to the official home of King of Juco. This is where we build something that lasts.
QuoteText: We're not just building a website. We're building a home.
